name: Wizard W3: Absorb Elements + Non-Fire Spells vs Fire-Immune Elemental
description: Tests Absorb Elements damage reaction, fire immunity on a fire elemental, and non-fire cantrips (Ray of Frost, Fire Bolt, Chill Touch) vs a fire-immune enemy. R1: Ray of Frost (cold) deals damage to Flame Sprite. Monster turn: Sprite attacks with fire, triggering Absorb Elements reaction which halves fire damage and consumes a L1 slot. R2: Fire Bolt (fire) hits Sprite but deals 0 damage due to fire immunity — confirms fire immune mechanic. R3: Chill Touch (necrotic, melee touch) deals damage to adjacent Sprite — confirms necrotic bypasses fire immunity.

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.description: Protect allies from evocation AoE spells.

monsters.comment: Fire elemental with fire immunity. Fire Slam attack triggers Absorb Elements on Wizard. Position 25ft from Wizard — reachable in 1 turn (speed 50).
monsters.name: Flame Sprite

monsters.comment: Non-fire beast — secondary enemy that ends turns to keep scenario deterministic.
monsters.name: Dire Wolf Pup

actions.comment: Pre-queue low initiative rolls for monsters. Flame Sprite: 1+3(DEX)=4. Dire Wolf Pup: 1+1(DEX)=2. Wizard rolls 20+2=22 and acts first.

input.label: Monster initiative rolls — keep Wizard first

actions.comment: === INITIATE COMBAT ===

input.text: I face the Flame Sprite, frost gathering around my fingers

actions.comment: High initiative roll — Wizard acts first (22 vs monster 4 and 2).
=== ROUND 1: Ray of Frost (cold) — non-fire damage works against fire-immune enemy ===

input.text: cast Ray of Frost at Flame Sprite

actions.comment: Attack roll: 14 + 7 (spellAttackBonus) = 21 vs AC 13 → HIT
Damage: 12 cold (2d8 at L5). Cold damage bypasses fire immunity. Sprite HP 100 → 88.
Verify cold damage applied — Sprite HP reduced from 100 to 88.
Pre-queue deterministic monster dice: Sprite attack roll d20=15 (15+5=20 vs AC12 → HIT), then Fire Slam damage 2d6: die1=3, die2=3 → total 3+3+3=9 fire damage.

input.label: Sprite Fire Slam: guaranteed hit and 9 fire damage

actions.comment: Queue R1 monster decisions: Sprite attacks Elara with Fire Slam (triggers Absorb Elements), Wolf ends turn.
End Wizard R1 turn → Sprite moves to Wizard and attacks with fire damage.
Wait for Absorb Elements reaction prompt. Sprite Fire Slam hits Wizard and deals fire damage (9). Server detects Absorb Elements eligibility (fire damage + spell slot available + reaction not used).
Use Absorb Elements: heals back floor(9/2)=4 HP, consumes 1 L1 spell slot, marks reaction used.
Wait for monster turns to finish and wizard's turn to return.
After Absorb Elements: Wizard took 9 fire damage then healed 4 back → net 5 damage → HP 95. L1 slot consumed (4→3).
=== ROUND 2: Fire Bolt (fire) — should deal 0 damage due to fire immunity ===

input.text: cast Fire Bolt at Flame Sprite

actions.comment: Attack roll: 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 13 → HIT (the attack succeeds, but fire immunity nullifies damage).
Fire damage: 15 fire damage rolled on 2d10 (L5 cantrip scaling). Fire immunity reduces to 0 — Sprite HP unchanged.
FIRE IMMUNITY CONFIRMED: Sprite HP still 88 — fire bolt dealt 0 damage despite hitting.
Queue R2 monsters: both end turn (no attacks this round to simplify).
End Wizard R2 turn.
Wait for monster turns to pass.
=== ROUND 3: Chill Touch (necrotic, melee touch) — Sprite is now adjacent after R1 move. Necrotic bypasses fire immunity. ===

input.text: cast Chill Touch at Flame Sprite

actions.comment: Melee spell attack roll: 16 + 7 = 23 vs AC 13 → HIT
Damage: 10 necrotic (2d10 at L5 scaling). Necrotic is not fire — Sprite takes full damage. HP 88 → 78.
NECROTIC DAMAGE CONFIRMED: Sprite HP reduced from 88 to 78.
=== FINAL STATE ASSERTIONS === Combat ongoing, both monsters alive, Wizard at reduced HP but functional. spellSlot_1 consumed by Absorb Elements (4→3), cantrips unlimited (no slot cost).
End Wizard R3 turn — scenario complete.
